name: @intentsolutionsio/crypto-derivatives-tracker
description: Track crypto futures, options, perpetual swaps with funding rates, open interest, and derivatives market analysis

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install crypto-derivatives-tracker\\n  or /plugin install crypto-derivatives-tracker@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
